description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features clean, straight lines and a combination of white and gray exterior walls, with large window panels on the front facade and smaller windows on the sides. The front area includes a wooden-floored porch space, partially sheltered by the building's overhang, and is adorned with a couple of small potted plants. The layout is open, with visible interior divisions suggesting multiple rooms and a central open space. The rear and side views reveal additional window placements and a clear separation between the main living area and a secondary section. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray walls, large front windows, and a wooden porch. The design is minimalist with clean lines and open spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large vertical windows, wooden porch, and potted plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, flat roof, and the separation between two main sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open central area, interior divisions, and additional window placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary section, side windows, and the extension of the porch flooring.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
